phases.title: Keep the patient safe
phases.confidence_target: I can keep the patient safe.

patterns.title: Chest pain
patterns.training_focus: Make safe decisions when the first explanation may be misleading.

phases.title: Handle overlap and uncertainty
phases.confidence_target: I can compare important possibilities without freezing.

phases.title: Communicate safely under pressure
phases.confidence_target: I can communicate safely when risk, emotion or conflict appears.

phases.title: Perform, observe and present
phases.confidence_target: I can perform clearly, identify findings and present them.
